# The Great Devil — US Interventions in Iran
# https://thegreatdevil.com

> A documented timeline of over 50 US interventions in Iran's internal affairs,
> from 1900 to today — coups, sanctions, cyber attacks, assassinations, and military strikes.
> Content is in Farsi (Persian) with English metadata.

## About This Site

This site documents historical US actions that directly interfered with Iran's sovereignty,
political system, economy, and people. Events are organized by era from 1900 to 2025.

Each event page includes:
- Year and category (coup, sanction, military, cyber, intelligence, diplomatic)
- Detailed description in Farsi
- Historical images where available
- Sources from Wikipedia, Britannica, USIP Iran Primer, GWU National Security Archive

## Key Historical Events Documented

- 1953: CIA-backed coup overthrow of PM Mohammad Mossadegh (Operation Ajax/TPAJAX)
- 1957: CIA assistance in establishing SAVAK (Shah's secret police)
- 1980-1988: US support for Saddam Hussein's Iraq against Iran
- 1985-1986: Iran-Contra affair (secret arms sales to Iran)
- 1988: USS Vincennes shooting down Iran Air Flight 655 (290 civilians killed)
- 1995-1996: Clinton executive orders banning US trade with Iran
- 2009-2010: Stuxnet cyberweapon targeting Natanz nuclear facility
- 2015: JCPOA nuclear deal
- 2018: Trump's unilateral withdrawal from JCPOA
- 2020: Assassination of General Qasem Soleimani
- 2025: Direct US military strikes on Iranian soil

## Site Structure

- Homepage: Timeline organized by era with grid layout
- /events/{slug}/: Individual detailed page for each event
- /sitemap.xml: Auto-generated sitemap (updated on every deploy)
- /robots.txt: Open to all crawlers

## Sources

- Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CIA_activities_in_Iran
- Britannica: https://www.britannica.com/topic/US-Iran-Relations-A-Timeline
- Iran Primer (USIP): https://iranprimer.usip.org/resource/timeline-us-sanctions
- GWU National Security Archive: https://nsarchive2.gwu.edu/NSAEBB/NSAEBB435/
